▲ Page top
A vendor that sells them..
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2011 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1599438061022
Scholar
145 posts
Darius Gandril, a dark elf merchant in PoK. Using the Find function, he is listed under General Supplies. Item cost is 10 plat, 5 gold each
▲ Page top
Good old Peridot...?
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2008 at 3:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361789685
Scholar
59 posts
My apologies if I'm mixed up here, but isn't this the good old Peridot? As in the ones which Clerics used to use for their Symbol line? It can be summoned now!? Good lord. Which class/spell?
▲ Page top
Good old Peridot...?
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2008 at 4:35 AM Rating: Decent
Plough
View User Forum
Scholar
190 posts
yes, but cleric spells no longer require componentsand havent so for a while now. Still used for Rune type spells.
____________________________
Plough E'mundar
Tradeskilling fiend of :
Baking (304)+15% - Brewing (309)+15%
Fletching (305)+15% - Fishing (205)+7%
Pottery (314)+15% - Jewellery (305)+15%
Smithing (313)+15% - Tailoring (312)+15%
Tinkering (300)+15% - Research (313)+15%
(Alt) Alchemy (300)+15% - (Alt) Make Poison (300)+15%

Frequently dropped off who?
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 1:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362249666
17 posts
Does anybody know what mob drops this FREQUENTLY??? I use these in several high level spells and if I could just farm them that would be awesome.(I'm cheap)
▲ Page top
RE: Frequently dropped off who?
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 9:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782532448
5 posts
They seem to be droppinf off Panda cubs, and young pandas in Stonebrunt quite often, i looted three peridots , and have 8 panda pelts which drop every kill. 3/8 aint bad =)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 20 2002 at 1:05 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) man alot of poeple drop this
